strings.start: I'll help you dispute this transaction. Let me gather some information.
strings.timeline_notice: The dispute process typically takes 6-8 weeks.
strings.contact_merchant_first: I recommend contacting the merchant first to resolve this directly.
strings.final_confirmation_proceed: Perfect. I'll submit your dispute now.
strings.final_confirmation_cancel: No problem. Your dispute has not been filed. Is there anything else I can help you with?
strings.complete: Thank you for providing all the information.
